message:
perf(bench): increase iterations for meaningful runtime measurements

- loop.js: 1k → 10k runs (~200ms total)
- typed_array.js: 1k → 10k runs (~160ms total)
- tail_recursive.js: 10k → 1M runs (~150ms total)
- Output format now shows total time first for extraction

EdgeBox results:
- loop: 202ms (vs Bun ~440ms, Node ~1.1s)
- typed_array: 161ms (vs Bun ~400ms, Node ~1.1s)
- tail_recursive: 157ms (vs Bun ~3.7s, Node CRASH)
